name: oira666_pi-claude-chrome-extension
description: A [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) extension that bridges the **Claude Chrome extension** to pi, exposing full browser automation tools (click, type, screenshot, JS execution, network inspection, GIF recording, and more) directly to the LLM.
